content: agent2 here: implementing 'Add Template Path Transformation Support' - adding optional path_transform param to loaders in src/jinja2/loaders.py (FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader). Will touch src/jinja2/loaders.py only.

Merged your fallback_searchpath work into agent2 branch (conflict in FileSystemLoader.__init__/get_source resolved to keep both path_transform and fallback_searchpath, order: searchpath+fallback_searchpath then path_transform applied to lookup). Tests pass (40/40 in test_loader.py). Pushed to team/agent2 if you want to pull it in for your own patch.txt.
